firebaseError.fallback: The operation could not be completed.

formValidation.tooLong: Please use no more than {{max}} characters.
formValidation.stepMismatch: Please enter a valid value. The two nearest valid values are {{low}} and {{high}}.
formValidation.stepGeneric: Please enter a valid value for this field.

accessCode.alreadyUsed: You have already used this code.
accessCode.exhausted: This code has reached its usage limit.

legal.saveFailed: Could not save acceptance — try again.

push.label: Push notifications
push.hint: Browser notifications when the site is closed (permission required)
push.hintRegistering: Requesting browser permission and FCM token…
push.syncFailed: Sync failed — try the change again or check your network connection.

errors.vapid_missing: VAPID key is not set. Add VITE_FIREBASE_VAPID_KEY to .env.local in the project root (Firebase Console → Project Settings → Cloud Messaging → Web Push certificates → Key pair). Then restart npm run dev.
errors.vapid_invalid: VAPID key is invalid. Check the Web Push certificate key in Firebase Console.
errors.denied: Browser notification permission was denied. You can enable notifications in the site permissions from the address bar.
errors.dismissed: Notification permission was not granted. Permission is required for push notifications.
errors.not_supported: This browser does not support push notifications.
errors.installations_denied: FCM setup error (Installations). Refresh the page and try again; if it persists, clear the browser cache.
errors.config_invalid: FCM configuration is invalid. Check that .env.local matches firebase-messaging-sw.js (npm run dev or npm run build).
errors.save_failed: Could not save the FCM token to Firestore. Make sure you are signed in.
errors.no_token: Could not get an FCM device token. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.error: Could not enable push notifications. Please try again.
